global.description: The ad features a combination of abstract shapes and text elements focused on promoting a service.
global.main_message: Promoting the VaultRun service as secure and simple.

elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Secure & simple Built for peace of mind', centrally positioned at the bottom.

elements.label: Brand name

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: Text in a bold font saying 'Order now', positioned at the bottom of the canvas.
